semantic.role: Infra facade module providing a stable, versioned entry point for core configuration schema resolution and validation functions.
responsibilities: Re-export resolveSpineConfig from core config-schema to allow consumers to resolve combined spine configuration.
Re-export validateSpineConfig to provide a single entry point for validating user-supplied configuration against the schema.
Re-export the SpineConfigValidationResult type to support type-safe validation result handling.
Act as an import barrier, ensuring callers import from the infra layer rather than reaching into core internals.
outOfScope: Direct usage of core/config-schema.ts internals (this module's purpose is to encapsulate that).
Logic that transforms or wraps the re-exported functions (none present).
Testing of the core config schema logic itself.
invariants: Should remain a strict re-export barrel without adding new logic.
Should not import from modules deeper than one level relative to infra layer.
Must always keep export signatures in sync with the source module.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable import surface for configuration validation in the infra layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era (no module-specific change evidence).

publicSurface.description: Resolves the combined spine configuration from layered config files and environment variables. Called by CLI commands and services that need the active config.
Validates a provided configuration object against the spine schema, returning validation errors if any. Used by init, config, and try commands before applying config.
The TypeScript type representing the result of spine configuration validation. Used by type-checking consumers to handle validation outcomes.
